overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character exploring a futuristic corporate building called 'CELT CORP'. The character moves from a dark corner through a grand lobby with neon lighting and display cases into an office workspace with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corner near wall with menu interface

events.description: character opens skill menu interface while standing in dark corner
character closes menu and begins walking toward doorway

agents.ego_description: standing in a dark corner accessing a skill menu, then moving toward a doorway

entered.detail: dark textured wall that the character is standing against
modern concrete bench with items on it
doorway leading to brightly lit lobby area

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dimly lit corner against a dark wall, opens a skill menu interface, then closes it and begins walking toward a doorway leading to a brighter area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand corporate lobby with high ceiling and neon lighting

events.description: character exits dark corridor into bright, spacious corporate lobby
character stops walking forward and looks up at the ceiling light fixture

agents.ego_description: walking through the main lobby entrance and looking up at the circular neon ceiling installation

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign with green logo and text
futuristic ceiling installation with concentric neon rings and star-like lights
tall vertical neon light strips flanking the entrance
modern reception counter with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark corridor into a vast, brightly lit corporate lobby. The camera pans up to reveal an elaborate ceiling installation with concentric neon rings while the CELT CORP sign glows prominently ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: lobby display area with glass terrariums

events.description: character stops briefly to examine the large glass display case
character continues walking past the display case toward reception

agents.ego_description: walking along the lobby perimeter and stopping briefly to examine a large glass terrarium containing exotic plants

entered.detail: large rectangular glass terrarium housing exotic plants and artifacts
tall potted plant with broad leaves flanking the display case
modern wall with horizontal metallic stripes and vertical lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the right side of the lobby past a large glass display case containing exotic flora, briefly stopping to examine the contents before continuing toward the reception area.

events.description: character passes reception desks and enters the office workspace area
character slows while passing two NPCs conversing near a desk

agents.ego_description: walking through the reception area past welcome desks and entering the office workspace, passing NPC employees

notable_agents.action: two office workers conversing near a desk, one in security uniform standing and one in business casual sitting on the desk edge

entered.detail: rows of office workstations with metal railings and dividers
large backlit corporate logo on the far office wall
red illuminated exit sign above doorway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the lobby into an office workspace, passing reception desks with glowing 'WELCOME' signs and entering an area with cubicles where NPC employees are standing and conversing near their workstations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, dimly lit corner into the expansive, neon-lit heart of a futuristic corporate headquarters. It begins with the character interacting with a skill menu against a dark wall before stepping forward through a doorway into a vast, brightly lit lobby. As the character emerges, the camera pans upward to reveal concentric neon rings on the ceiling and a glowing CELT CORP sign, shifting the atmosphere from claustrophobic shadow to corporate grandeur. The movement continues along the perimeter of the lobby, passing a glass display of exotic flora, before transitioning through a reception area marked by glowing welcome signs. Finally, the scene opens into a bustling office workspace where the camera glides past cubicles and conversing employees.
